name: BRCA1 1Mb window (K562 Hi-C ground truth)
description: 1Mb window centered on BRCA1 for sparsity/scale validation. Ground truth extracted from 4DNFI18UHVRO.mcool (K562, 1000bp, KR balanced).

enhancers.name: BRCA1_TSS_NBR2_bidirectional_promoter
enhancers.note: BRCA1 TSS (minus strand, NM_007294.4). Bidirectional promoter shared with NBR2 lncRNA, separated by ~218bp. MCF7 H3K27ac signal=6.46 (Peak_8575, 43125615-43126163). K562 H3K27ac signal=72.62 (Peak_723, 43124355-43126810, strongest in K562 — CpG island). Suen et al. 1998 (PMID:9685411)

enhancers.name: NBR1_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Strong MCF7 H3K27ac peak at NBR1 promoter (Peak_7461, 43170409-43171012, signal=6.48). Second MCF7 H3K27ac peak nearby (Peak_20783, 43171213-43171892, signal=5.18). K562 H3K27ac mega-peak signal=50.77 (43168861-43172854, 4kb). Co-localizes with strong CTCF cluster. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy from signal ratio

enhancers.name: PTGES3L_RUNDC1_enhancer_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: MCF7 H3K27ac peak at PTGES3L/RUNDC1 boundary (Peak_11808, 42981232-42981777, signal=6.10). K562 H3K27ac signal=42.22 (42979094-42981963, 2.9kb broad). Co-localizes with CTCF peak. ~63kb upstream of BRCA1 TSS

enhancers.name: IFI35_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: MCF7 H3K27ac peak at IFI35 promoter (Peak_14328, 43006792-43007347, signal=5.66). K562 signal=25.03. Co-localizes with strong CTCF (K562 signal=76.68, MCF7 signal=56.92). ~118kb upstream of BRCA1 TSS

enhancers.name: RPL27_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: MCF7 H3K27ac twin peaks (Peak_39312, 42998568-42998778, signal=3.66 and Peak_40498, 42998839-42999307, signal=3.70). K562 H3K27ac signal=38.91 (42997379-43000593, 3.2kb broad). Co-localizes with strongest CTCF in window. Housekeeping gene RPL27

enhancers.name: G6PC1_downstream_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: K562 H3K27ac signal=58.86 (42928242-42929442). No corresponding MCF7 peak. Co-localizes with CTCF. ~196kb upstream of BRCA1 TSS. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy — K562-specific activity

enhancers.name: AARSD1_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: MCF7 H3K27ac peak (Peak_33803, 42964600-42964855, signal=4.26). K562 signal=28.86 (42963531-42964966). Near AARSD1 promoter. ~161kb upstream of BRCA1 TSS

enhancers.name: VAT1_RND2_boundary_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Weak MCF7 H3K27ac (Peak_50769, 43024811-43025024, signal=3.52). K562 signal=24.20 (43024191-43025125). Co-localizes with strongest CTCF in window. ~101kb upstream of BRCA1 TSS

enhancers.name: VAT1_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: K562 H3K27ac twin peaks (17.59 at 43020887-43022646 and 13.52 at 43019469-43020849). Overlaps VAT1 gene (minus strand). ~104kb upstream of BRCA1 TSS

ctcf_sites.name: G6PC1_downstream_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=70.87 (42929302-42929572). MCF7 signal=49.21 (42929352-42929542). ENCODE clustered TF score=1000. Near 5-prime window boundary

ctcf_sites.name: AARSD1_upstream_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=74.93 (42937795-42938065). MCF7 signal=85.08 (42937831-42938021). ENCODE clustered TF score=1000. Candidate 5-prime TAD boundary element. MCF7 signal STRONGER than K562

ctcf_sites.name: AARSD1_promoter_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: MCF7 signal=20.47 (42964282-42964472). Near AARSD1 promoter. ENCODE clustered TF score=314

ctcf_sites.name: RUNDC1_boundary_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: MCF7 signal=55.72 (42980830-42981020). K562 signal=38.67 (42980803-42981073). ENCODE clustered TF score=733. At PTGES3L/RUNDC1 boundary, co-localizes with H3K27ac

ctcf_sites.name: RPL27_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=95.03 (42998070-42998208). MCF7 signal=83.40 (42998163-42998213). ENCODE clustered TF score=1000 (185 sources). Co-localizes with RPL27 promoter. Candidate sub-TAD boundary. ENCODE cCRE type: PLS (z=7.47)

ctcf_sites.name: RPL27_IFI35_intergenic_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=10.76 (43003912-43004182). No MCF7 peak at this site. ENCODE clustered TF score=318. Weak but reproducible

ctcf_sites.name: IFI35_promoter_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=76.68 (43006606-43006876). MCF7 signal=56.92 (43006641-43006831). ENCODE clustered TF score=1000. At IFI35 promoter, co-localizes with strong H3K27ac

ctcf_sites.name: VAT1_RND2_boundary_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: STRONGEST CTCF in window. K562 signal=147.45 (43024479-43024679). MCF7 signal=131.59 (43024502-43024648). ENCODE clustered TF score=1000 (173 sources). Between VAT1 and RND2. ~20kb upstream of BRCA1 start. ENCODE cCRE type: pELS (z=5.06)

ctcf_sites.name: BRCA1_5prime_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Weak K562-only CTCF ~2kb upstream of BRCA1 CDS start (43042167-43042407). No MCF7 peak. ENCODE clustered TF score=205

ctcf_sites.name: BRCA1_intragenic_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Weak K562-only CTCF within BRCA1 gene body (intron region, 43085590-43085830). No MCF7 peak. ENCODE clustered TF score=533. May function as intragenic insulator

ctcf_sites.name: BRCA1_promoter_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=22.19 (43124431-43124701). No MCF7 peak at this exact site. ENCODE clustered TF score=348. At BRCA1/NBR2 bidirectional promoter boundary. Co-localizes with strongest H3K27ac in K562 (signal=72.62). ENCODE cCRE type: PLS (z=6.87)

ctcf_sites.name: NBR1_boundary_CTCF_1
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=45.94 (43171137-43171407). MCF7 signal=19.74 (43171188-43171378). ENCODE clustered TF score=783. Strong CTCF at NBR1 5-prime region. Co-localizes with H3K27ac. Candidate 3-prime TAD boundary element. ENCODE cCRE type: PLS (z=7.32)

ctcf_sites.name: NBR1_boundary_CTCF_2
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=31.05 (43172207-43172477). ~1kb from NBR1_boundary_CTCF_1, likely tandem boundary pair. ENCODE clustered TF score=589. Co-localizes with broad H3K27ac

ctcf_sites.name: TMEM106A_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=15.22 (43214141-43214411). MCF7 signal=17.95 (43211948-43212138). Within TMEM106A gene. Near 3-prime window boundary

tad_boundaries.name: BRCA1_primary_TAD
tad_boundaries.note: Primary TAD containing BRCA1 (220kb). hg19: 41160000-41380000 lifted to hg38 with +1,847,982bp offset (APPROXIMATE — not formal liftOver). Contains IFI35, VAT1, RND2, BRCA1, NBR2, BRCA1P1, NBR1, TMEM106A. Rao et al. 2014 Cell (PMID:25497547)

tad_boundaries.name: downstream_TAD
tad_boundaries.note: Downstream TAD (450kb). hg19: 41430000-41880000. Contains CCDC200 and extends beyond window

ctcf_chipseq_mcf7.note: MCF7 is breast cancer cell line where BRCA1 is actively expressed. CTCF sites largely overlap with K562 (cell-type invariant). MCF7 CTCF used as primary reference for BRCA1 regulatory context

h3k27ac_chipseq_mcf7.note: MCF7 H3K27ac marks active enhancers and promoters in breast cancer cells. BRCA1 is active in MCF7. Used as primary source for enhancer occupancy estimates

h3k27ac_chipseq_k562.note: K562 H3K27ac used for cross-validation. K562 shows strong H3K27ac at BRCA1 promoter CpG island (signal=72.62) despite BRCA1 being largely inactive in K562 — reflects CpG island constitutive acetylation

tad_domains.liftover_method: linear offset +1847982bp (APPROXIMATE — not formal liftOver, based on BRCA1 NM_007294 hg19=41196312 vs hg38=43044294)

ccre_annotations.note: ENCODE Registry of candidate cis-Regulatory Elements. Types: PLS=promoter-like, pELS=proximal enhancer-like, dELS=distal enhancer-like. Used for functional annotation of CTCF sites

ctcf_clustered.note: Multi-cell-type CTCF cluster scores (0-1000). Score=1000 indicates binding detected across many cell types (cell-type invariant). Used to confirm CTCF site robustness

gene_annotations.note: NBR2 coordinates from ncbiRefSeq (not ncbiRefSeqCurated) as NBR2 is a lncRNA. BRCA1P1 coordinates from GeneCards. NBR1 from NCBI Gene ID 4077

studies.finding: BRCA1 and NBR2 share a bidirectional promoter; TSS separated by ~218bp
NBR2 lncRNA is activated by AMPK under energy stress via shared bidirectional promoter with BRCA1

_thresholds_note: Not calibrated for 400x400 matrix. SSIM thresholds require empirical calibration after first BRCA1 ARCHCODE run. Matrix-size dilution expected to be stronger than TP53 (400 bins vs 300 bins).
